data.title: Nvidia Set For 'Clear Beat And Raise Special' As AI Demand Surges, Says Dan Ives
data.description: Nvidia is poised to deliver another strong earnings performance this week, according to Wedbush Securities analyst Dan Ives.

data.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX To Undertake Starship's 8th Test Flight On Friday
data.description: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk said on Sunday that the next test flight of its Starship launch vehicle will be on Friday or Feb. 28.

data.title: Elon Musk's Grok AI Silences Trump, Tesla CEO's Misinformation Claims, Then Backtracks — xAI Blames Former OpenAI Employee
data.description: Grok AI briefly blocked search results linking Elon Musk and Donald Trump to misinformation due to an unauthorized system prompt change.

data.title: Bitcoin, Dogecoin Stumble, But This New Crypto Skyrockets 140% In A Week
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market encountered headwinds last week, although a few under-the-radar coins notched up significant gains. 



What happened: IP, the native token of Layer-1 blockchain Story, powered above the rest of the market with a whopping 138% jump last week.

data.title: Trump Promised To Bring Food, Egg Prices Under Control Starting Day One, But They Are Still High: Expert Mocks Alternatives Being Suggested
data.description: Economic commentator Noah Smith sparked debate over food affordability solutions, mocking suggested alternatives to eggs amid soaring prices.
